title: Valka municipality working out how to tighten its belt
summary_full: In order to find a solution to the long-standing financial problems of Valka municipality, the Ministry of Finance (MoF) has called on the local government to change its current approach to budget and financial management, settle accounts with creditors, and pay outstanding taxes by June 1.
